zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡整理偏多格局
zh.content:
当前SOL围绕73.5窄幅震荡，价格略高于SMA20，整体呈横盘整理略偏多结构，但趋势动能仍未有效放大，市场处于方向选择前的蓄势阶段。

MACD处于轻微负值区间，短线动能偏弱，多空力量暂时均衡。虽然缺乏RSI参考，但从波动结构看既未进入超买也未触及超卖，整体偏中性整理。

下方关键支撑位于73.2附近，一旦跌破可能回踩73整数关口；上方阻力集中在73.6与73.8区域，突破前高将打开短线延续空间。

操作上建议以区间交易为主，靠近支撑轻仓试多，接近阻力逐步止盈，同时严格控制风险，止损可设在73.1下方防止假突破带来的快速回落。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana vs USD is trading in tight consolidation around 73.53, reflecting a 0.29% intraday gain. Price action shows reduced volatility, coiling just above the 20-day SMA at 73.404. This suggests equilibrium between buyers and sellers after recent directional attempts. The structure remains neutral to slightly constructive as price stabilizes near local equilibrium levels.

MACD is slightly negative at -0.056018917, indicating mild bearish momentum, though not yet confirming a strong downtrend. The absence of RSI limits overbought or oversold assessment, increasing reliance on price structure. The 20-day SMA at 73.404 acts as dynamic support, with price hovering just above it, suggesting equilibrium rather than directional conviction.

Support is identified near the intraday low at 73.19, with stronger psychological support around 73.00. On the upside, resistance is evident at the session high of 73.59, which currently caps price expansion. A break above this level could open room toward higher zones, while failure to hold above 73.40 may invite retests of lower support.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy rather than trend following. Traders may consider buying near support around 73.19 to 73.40 with risk below 73.00, targeting resistance at 73.59 and potential extension toward 74.00 if momentum improves. Alternatively, rejection near resistance may offer short opportunities, but confirmation via volume or momentum shift is recommended before positioning.
